positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial landscape. Focus on large, glowing abstract moons and constellations connected by delicate, ethereal lines. The composition features a central, powerful crescent moon casting dramatic shadows on stylized geometric mountains and floating nebula clouds. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, brilliant gold, and pearl white. The style should be sophisticated, clean vector art with a slight woodcut engraving texture, ensuring strong silhouettes and clean lines suitable for a repeating pattern or central apparel placement. Artwork must be highly symmetrical and visually balanced, emphasizing negative space.
